semantics.pass: All known Amazon regular/min/max and effective consumer semantics exact, promo applied+proved under an owner-approved contract, and ChannelMAX control safe.
semantics.fail: At least one observed active-row price/control value is known wrong.
semantics.blocked: No known hard mismatch after catalog exclusion handling, but required live evidence, owner approval, promo proof, or safe ChannelMAX control is absent.

evidence_caveat: Amazon offer prices are later than the full Listings snapshot. Regular/B2B/min/max are point-in-time from the full snapshot (QX overridden by its later settlement evidence); no later full 164-row attribute readback proves persistence after the ChannelMAX snapshot. Coupons have no live application/readback artifact.
